other_observers: Nick Komar, Cole Wild, m.ob.; I was the original finder
description: A pale, cream-colored larus, similar in size to California Gull, noticeably smaller than herring Gull, with a small head and bill. Almost completely con-colorous, but with very slightly darker primaries and tail band, but still very pale tan. Dark bill and pinkish legs.Behaviors: Flying, swiming, feeding and chasing other gulls around the lake.Call: nonePlumage: 1st cycle
photographer: Photographer: Glenn Walbek, Glenn Walbek, Glenn Walbek
